known_drug_rows.notes: Approved prodrug; active form is baloxavir acid
Use active metabolite as structural/docking control where available

structure_rows.description: Influenza A/California/04/2009 PA endonuclease with bound baloxavir acid

primary_structure.description: Influenza A/California/04/2009 PA endonuclease with bound baloxavir acid

binding_site.description: Metal-dependent PA endonuclease active site bound by baloxavir acid.
binding_site.box_strategy: Use baloxavir acid centroid and preserve catalytic metal treatment during receptor preparation.

computational_validation: Use baloxavir acid as positive control.
Treat docking results as lower confidence unless pose chemistry is reviewed.
experimental_validation: Cap-dependent endonuclease inhibition or cell-based susceptibility assay.
closed_loop_assets.assay_path: Cap-dependent endonuclease inhibition or cell-based susceptibility assay.

evidence_quality.interpretation: Evidence score ranks source readiness for the computational closed loop; it is not a measured efficacy score.
